# Description

<!-- Please include a summary of the changes and the related issue.
If fixing a bug, include `Fixes #<issue_number>` so it closes automatically. -->

# Type of Change

<!-- Check one or more: -->

-   [ ] Bug fix
-   [ ] New feature
-   [ ] Documentation update
-   [ ] Refactoring / maintenance
-   [ ] Dependency update
-   [ ] Other (describe below)

# Changes

<!-- Briefly list the changes you have made, e.g., new functions, updates to existing functions, etc. -->

# Checklist

<!-- Check the following before submitting: -->

- [ ] I have incremented the version in `DESCRIPTION` if applicable
- [ ] `NAMESPACE` is updated and functions are properly exported
- [ ] I ran `devtools::check()` / `R CMD check` and it passes without errors or warnings
- [ ] I added or updated documentation using `roxygen2`
- [ ] I added or updated unit tests (e.g., using `testthat`)
- [ ] All dependencies in `DESCRIPTION` are correct

# Additional Notes

<!-- Anything else reviewers should know (e.g., breaking changes, known issues, testing instructions) -->
